title: arctium stenolepis
intro: Arctium stenolepis, also known as Lesser Burdock or Burdock, is a biennial plant species within the thistle family (Asteraceae). The roots and leaves of Arctium stenolepis have been used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arctium stenolepis include its ability to support skin and digestive health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Arctium stenolepis is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root supplement in herbal preparations.
